sql_array: CREATE TABLE dav_collection (col_id INT, path VARCHAR(255), permissions VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO dav_collection (col_id, path, permissions) VALUES (1, '/DAV/user/', '110100000R');
INSERT INTO dav_collection (col_id, path, permissions) VALUES (2, '/DAV/user/A/', '110100000R');
SELECT DB.DBA.DAV_COL_CREATE (path, permissions, 'dav', 'dav', 'dav', 'dav') FROM dav_collection WHERE col_id = 1;
SELECT * FROM dav_collection WHERE path = '/DAV/user/A/' AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM dav_collection WHERE path = '/DAV/user/') AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dav_collection) > 1;
SELECT DB.DBA.DAV_RES_UPLOAD ('/DAV/user/A/test.txt', 'Sample content', 'text/plain', (SELECT col_id FROM dav_collection WHERE path = '/DAV/user/'), 'dav', 'dav', 'dav', 'dav') FROM dual;
SELECT DB.DBA.DAV_DELETE ((SELECT '/DAV/user/A/test.txt' WHERE path IS NOT NULL), 0, 'dav', 'dav') FROM dual;
SELECT DB.DBA.DAV_COL_CREATE ('/DAV/user/B/', '110100000R', 'dav', CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 WHERE path IS NULL) THEN NULL ELSE 'dav' END, 'dav', 'dav') FROM dual;
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN DB.DBA.DAV_COL_CREATE ('/DAV/user/Empty/', '110100000R', 'dav', 'dav', 'dav', 'dav') ELSE NULL END AS new_col FROM dav_collection;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DB.DBA.DAV_RES_UPLOAD ('/DAV/user/A/empty.txt', '', 'text/plain', 2, 'dav', 'dav', 'dav', 'dav') AS res_id FROM dual HAVING res_id IS NOT NULL);
